response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed the entire video segment. 2. Determined the content is a static promotional image for a concert, accompanied by instrumental music. 3. Confirmed there is no vocal music present in the clip.
response.global_summary: The video is a static end-screen for the 'DRAWN TO DAWN' concert featuring Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis, accompanied by instrumental background music throughout. There is no vocal music in this segment.

scenes.description: A static image showing promotional art and text for the 'DRAWN TO DAWN' concert. The video is accompanied by instrumental music with no vocals.
